message:
🐛 Fix compliance hooks to always poll when clusters exist (#2118)

The auto-refresh in useKyverno, useKubescape, and useTrivy only ran
when at least one tool was detected as installed. If the initial fetch
failed (e.g., cluster unreachable), the hooks would never retry,
leaving the heatmap stuck on N/A even after clusters became reachable.

Remove the hasInstalled guard so hooks always poll every 2 minutes
when clusters are connected, enabling detection of newly installed
tools and clusters that come back online.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
